title: 4 PCS Wind Up Toys for Kids, Funny Crawling Snake Toy Set, Cartoon Animal Car Clockwork Toys for Halloween Christmas Birthday Party Favors, for Boys Girls Kids Toddlers
features: 4 Piece Wind Up Toys Set: Cartoon Animal Car Clockwork Toys contains 4 wind-up snake. Yellow, green, pink and purple, bright colors and funny forward poses will easily grab your child's attention and stimulate crawling and running. This toy car is perfect for children aged 1, 2 and 3 years.

Easy to Play: Wind up toys powered by a metal spring that is tightened by turning it, classical funny simple games, no battery needed. Each clockwork snake toy measures 13 x 5.6 x 6.7 cm and can be easily grasped by children over 1 year old.

Safety & Sturdy: Our clockwork toys are made of high-quality PVC material, non-toxic and tasteless, which is safe for children and pets. These toys are durable, not easy to break, and can be used for a long time.

Funny Toys for Kids & Adults: This fun toy car stimulates children's imagination, hand-eye coordination and color recognition while playing, thus keeping it away from electronic devices and encouraging curiosity about the world. The clock snake is a fun crawl and can also be used as a stress-relieving toy for adults.

The Perfect Toy Gift for boys and girls aged 1, 2 and 3+: If you are looking for an interesting gift for your child, our cartoon snake Wind up toys car is a great choice for you. Great gift for kids party favors, goodie bags, classroom rewards, stocking stuffers, easter egg stuffers, birthday, children's day, christmas ,thanksgiving, and New Year's party.
